name: Unikezelo lweNdawo eNgxamisekileyo
description: Ulawulo lonikezelo olukhawulezayo okanye olungacwangciswanga kwindawo enzima.
steps: Beka umama supine okanye ulale kancinci. Ukuthambeka kwicala lasekhohlo kuyakhethwa ukuba akukho zingqondweni (ukuthintela ukucinezelwa kwe-aortocaval).
Lawula ukuhanjiswa kwentloko -- inkxaso ngesundu. Sukutsala.
Emva kokuba intloko ihanjiswe, khangela intambo ye-nuchal (ejikeleze intamo). Ukuba ikhona, tyibilika phezu kwentloko. Ukuba iqinile, yibambe kwaye usike.
Funxa umlomo emva koko impumlo ngesirinji yebhalbhu ukuba ikhona.
Isikhokelo sokuhanjiswa kwegxalaba langaphambili ngokutsala kancinci entloko, emva koko unyuse igxalaba elingasemva.
Yomisa kwaye ufudumale usana ngokukhawuleza. Hlaziya ngokuphulula umqolo.
Bamba kwaye unqumle intambo (linda i-1-2 min ukuba usana luzinzile).
Zisa i-placenta ngokutsala okuthambileyo okulawulekayo -- SUKUQHAKAZA.
Lawula i-oxytocin (ukuba ikhona) ukuthintela ukopha kwangemva kokubeleka emva kokubeleka kwe-placenta.
Vavanya ukopha kwasemva kokubeleka -- ifundal massage, ucinezelo lwe-bimanual ukuba kuyafuneka.
Vavanya amanqaku e-Apgar kwi-1 kunye nemizuzu emi-5.
warnings: Ukuba ukuhanjiswa akukafiki -- SUKU uzame. I-MEDEVAC ekhawulezayo iyakhethwa.
I-dystocia yamagxa: ukuba amagxa abambelele, sebenzisa i-McRoberts maneuver (hyperflex hips) kunye noxinzelelo lwe-suprapubic.
Ukopha kwasemva kokubeleka ngoyena nobangela uphambili wokubhubha kukamama okunokuthinteleka -- yiba ne-oxytocin sele ilungile.
